alarms.name: zxAnEnvPowerOverVoltageAlm
alarms.canonical_name: zx An Env Power Over Voltage Alm
alarms.description:
It indicates that the input voltage of power supply is 
           over-voltage.
probable_causes: Falla de la fuente de alimentacion
Voltaje de entrada fuera de rango
Bateria agotada o en fallo
remediation: Verificar la fuente y el voltaje de entrada

alarms.name: zxAnEnvPowerOverVoltageClr
alarms.canonical_name: zx An Env Power Over Voltage Clr
alarms.description: It indicates that the over-voltage fault is cleared.
probable_causes: Falla de la fuente de alimentacion
Voltaje de entrada fuera de rango
Bateria agotada o en fallo
remediation: Verificar la fuente y el voltaje de entrada

alarms.name: zxAnEnvPowerUnderVoltageAlm
alarms.canonical_name: zx An Env Power Under Voltage Alm
alarms.description:
It indicates that the input voltage of power supply is 
           under-voltage.
probable_causes: Falla de la fuente de alimentacion
Voltaje de entrada fuera de rango
Bateria agotada o en fallo
remediation: Verificar la fuente y el voltaje de entrada

alarms.name: zxAnEnvPowerUnderVoltageClr
alarms.canonical_name: zx An Env Power Under Voltage Clr
alarms.description: It indicates that the under-voltage fault is cleared.
probable_causes: Falla de la fuente de alimentacion
Voltaje de entrada fuera de rango
Bateria agotada o en fallo
remediation: Verificar la fuente y el voltaje de entrada

alarms.name: zxAnEnvBatteryUnderVoltageAlm
alarms.canonical_name: zx An Env Battery Under Voltage Alm
alarms.description:
A zxAnEnvBatteryUnderVoltageAlm trap is sent when the battery 
           voltage is under-voltage.
probable_causes: Falla de la fuente de alimentacion
Voltaje de entrada fuera de rango
Bateria agotada o en fallo
remediation: Verificar la fuente y el voltaje de entrada

alarms.name: zxAnEnvBatteryUnderVoltageClr
alarms.canonical_name: zx An Env Battery Under Voltage Clr
alarms.description:
A zxAnEnvBatteryUnderVoltageClr trap is sent when the battery 
           voltage becomes normal.
probable_causes: Falla de la fuente de alimentacion
Voltaje de entrada fuera de rango
Bateria agotada o en fallo
remediation: Verificar la fuente y el voltaje de entrada

alarms.name: zxAnIfAccesslinkUp
alarms.canonical_name: zx An If Accesslink Up
alarms.description: The operational status of access link interface changes to up.
probable_causes: Cambio de estado o parametro reportado
Inconsistencia de configuracion
Evento de protocolo (registro/deregistro)

alarms.name: zxAnIfAccesslinkDown
alarms.canonical_name: zx An If Accesslink Down
alarms.description: The operational status of access link interface changes to down.
probable_causes: Cambio de estado o parametro reportado
Inconsistencia de configuracion
Evento de protocolo (registro/deregistro)

alarms.name: zxAnInnerPortDownAlm
alarms.canonical_name: zx An Inner Port Down Alm
alarms.description:
When the inner port of the card is down, the card will be reset 
            by NE twice. If the fault still exists, a zxAnInnerPortDownAlm 
            trap will be sent.
probable_causes: Falla o mal contacto de tarjeta/subtarjeta
Tarjeta no soportada o incompatible
Sobrecalentamiento del modulo

alarms.name: zxAnInnerPortDownClr
alarms.canonical_name: zx An Inner Port Down Clr
alarms.description:
A zxAnInnerPortDownClr trap is sent when the 
            zxAnInnerPortDownAlm is cleared.
probable_causes: Cambio de estado o parametro reportado
Inconsistencia de configuracion
Evento de protocolo (registro/deregistro)

alarms.name: zxAnOptRxPwrUnderThreshAlm
alarms.canonical_name: zx An Opt Rx Pwr Under Thresh Alm
alarms.description: It indicates that zxAnOpticalIfRxPwrCurrValue is below  the zxAnOpticalRxPwrLowerThresh.
probable_causes: Corte o degradacion de la fibra
Conector optico sucio o mal insertado
Potencia optica Rx/Tx fuera de rango
ONU apagada o desconectada
remediation: Verificar continuidad y limpieza de la fibra
Medir potencia optica Rx/Tx en el puerto
Revisar estado y alimentacion de la ONU

alarms.name: zxAnOptRxPwrUnderThreshClr
alarms.canonical_name: zx An Opt Rx Pwr Under Thresh Clr
alarms.description: zxAnOptRxPwrUnderThreshAlm clear
probable_causes: Cambio de estado o parametro reportado
Inconsistencia de configuracion
Evento de protocolo (registro/deregistro)

alarms.name: zxAnOptRxPwrOverThreshAlm
alarms.canonical_name: zx An Opt Rx Pwr Over Thresh Alm
alarms.description: It indicates that zxAnOpticalIfRxPwrCurrValue is exceeds  the zxAnOpticalRxPwrUpperThresh.

Conector optico sucio o mal insertado

remediation: Verificar continuidad y limpieza de la fibra
Medir potencia optica Rx/Tx en el puerto
Revisar estado y alimentacion de la ONU

It indicates that zxAnOpticalTemperature is below 
              the zxAnOpticalTempLowerThresh.

Obstruccion del flujo de aire

alarms.name: zxAnOptChanTxPwrUnderThreshAlm
alarms.canonical_name: zx An Opt Chan Tx Pwr Under Thresh Alm
alarms.description:
A zxAnOptChanTxPwrUnderThreshAlm trap is sent when the agent has
             detected that the zxAnOpticalChanCurrTxPwr has been less than 
             the zxAnOpticalTxPwrLowerThresh.
probable_causes: Corte o degradacion de la fibra
Conector optico sucio o mal insertado
Potencia optica Rx/Tx fuera de rango
ONU apagada o desconectada
remediation: Verificar continuidad y limpieza de la fibra
Medir potencia optica Rx/Tx en el puerto
Revisar estado y alimentacion de la ONU

Evento de protocolo (registro/deregistro)

alarms.name: zxAnSwAutoUpdateFinished
alarms.canonical_name: zx An Sw Auto Update Finished
alarms.description:
A zxAnSwAutoUpdateFinished is sent when the agent has detected 
            that the automatic update is finished.
probable_causes: Cambio de estado o parametro reportado
Inconsistencia de configuracion
Evento de protocolo (registro/deregistro)

alarms.name: zxAnSwAutoUpdateSwDiffer
alarms.canonical_name: zx An Sw Auto Update Sw Differ
alarms.description:
A zxAnSwAutoUpdateSwDiffer is sent when the agent has 
            detected different version files between NE and file server.
probable_causes: Cambio de estado o parametro reportado
Inconsistencia de configuracion
Evento de protocolo (registro/deregistro)

alarms.name: zxAnSwAutoUpdateSwChkFailed
alarms.canonical_name: zx An Sw Auto Update Sw Chk Failed
alarms.description:
A zxAnSwAutoUpdateSwChkFailed is sent when the agent has 
            detected that version check is failed.
probable_causes: Cambio de estado o parametro reportado
Inconsistencia de configuracion
Evento de protocolo (registro/deregistro)

alarms.name: curAlarmTrap
alarms.canonical_name: cur Alarm Trap
alarms.description:
When an alarm occurred, 
           send the trap PDU to uniform network manager.
           Through the configuration command alarm trap-oid-expand, 
           the trap OID can be expanded, adding alarm status and code.
probable_causes: Cambio de estado o parametro reportado
Inconsistencia de configuracion
Evento de protocolo (registro/deregistro)

alarms.name: heartbeatNotification
alarms.canonical_name: heartbeat Notification
alarms.description: Send a heart-beat trap when required.
probable_causes: Cambio de estado o parametro reportado
Inconsistencia de configuracion
Evento de protocolo (registro/deregistro)

alarms.name: zxr10AlarmPreloadCancelTrap
alarms.canonical_name: zxr10 Alarm Preload Cancel Trap
alarms.description:
When an alarm preload canceled, 
           send the trap PDU to uniform network manager.

Inconsistencia de configuracion
Evento de protocolo (registro/deregistro)
